description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Flatpak that runs on pull requests and pushes to the master branch. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build Flatpak packages for x86_64 and aarch64 architectures in a privileged container. It checks out the code, installs dependencies, sets up QEMU for non-x86_64 architectures, builds the Flatpak package, and uploads it to GitHub Releases for continuous and tagged releases.
